spec.name: In A Clearing
spec.description: You come to a small clearing now, after walking for several minutes through the silent woods. An odd block sticks up here and there in the ground... wait a minute. These stones seem a little too regular, and from the circle formation and size you could almost swear that they were... crenellations? Could some sort of building been buried by the lava here? A rusty ring sticks out of the earth in the center... a trapdoor? This is almost too good to be true!

down.description: An ancient trapdoor, grimed with earth and age.
